nasb.text: then watch yourself, that you do not forget the Lord who brought you from the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.

esv.text: then take care lest you forget the Lord, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.

cnv.text: 那時，你要謹慎，免得你忘記了耶和華，就是把你從埃及地，從為奴之家領出來的那一位。

ccb.text: 要小心，不可忘记把你们从受奴役之地——埃及救出来的耶和华。
